canonical_formula: analytic expectation under probability 1/81 for every canonical candidate
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: none

canonical_formula: select the unique ERM anchor in each context
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: none

canonical_formula: select OACI trajectory_order=40
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: none

canonical_formula: select SRC trajectory_order=40
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: none

canonical_formula: select OACI trajectory_order=20
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: B4 expanded prospectively into one midpoint per trajectory family

canonical_formula: select SRC trajectory_order=20
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: B4 expanded prospectively into one midpoint per trajectory family

canonical_formula: minimum held-evaluation regret over 81 candidates
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: never enters selector comparison or taxonomy

canonical_formula: mean across source domains of macro class recall from frozen source predictions
required_inputs: source predictions labels and domain IDs
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: frozen source audit rather than a newly held-out source training fold

canonical_formula: negative mean source NLL with equal source-domain weighting
required_inputs: source probabilities labels and domain IDs
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: none

canonical_formula: mean held-source-domain score from models retrained without each source domain
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: required folds do not exist and new training is forbidden

canonical_formula: exact registered cross-fitted F2 predicted utility per candidate
required_inputs: frozen per-candidate cross-fitted predictions for both seeds
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: committed compact artifacts contain qualification aggregates but no execution-bound per-candidate selector descriptor

canonical_formula: mean_i max_k p_ik
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: none

canonical_formula: mean_i sum_k p_ik log(p_ik)
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: none

canonical_formula: mean_i logsumexp_k(logit_ik) with T=1
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: temperature fixed prospectively at 1

canonical_formula: H(mean_i p_i)-mean_i H(p_i)
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: none

canonical_formula: nuclear_norm(P)/sqrt(min(N,K)*N)
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: none

canonical_formula: source_domain_balanced_BAcc + mean_target_MSP - mean_source_MSP
required_inputs: source labels probabilities domains and target probabilities
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: balanced-accuracy adaptation is declared because the endpoint is balanced accuracy

canonical_formula: threshold source MSP at quantile 1-source_domain_balanced_BAcc; score is target fraction MSP above threshold
required_inputs: source labels probabilities domains and target probabilities
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: ATC-MC fixed; balanced domain weighting matches the registered endpoint

canonical_formula: source validation loss weighted by p_target(x)/p_source(x)
required_inputs: frozen density ratios on source validation rows
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: no frozen density-ratio estimator exists; fitting one is a new model

canonical_formula: importance-weighted validation with embedded domain discrimination and control variate
required_inputs: frozen DEV domain discriminator weights and embedded validation contract
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: required discriminator is absent and fitting it is forbidden

canonical_formula: optimized group-weighted source accuracy estimate for target vicinity
required_inputs: prospectively defined groups and frozen optimized group weights
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: groups and fitted weights are absent; creating them would invent a new estimator

canonical_formula: delta=mean uniform cross-entropy over full target set; if delta>5 use softmax(logits), else row-L1-normalize(logits+1+logits^2/2-row_min); score=L4(P)/(N*K)^(1/4)
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: order-invariant whole-set delta replaces official first-five-loader-batch estimate; p=4 and scaling branch otherwise exact to official commit b9c0262

canonical_formula: 1-mean optimal assignment L_infinity cost between target probability rows and one-hot source-empirical-prior support
required_inputs: target probabilities and source empirical class prior
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: noninteger prior counts use deterministic largest-remainder apportionment tied by class ID

canonical_formula: COT per-row matched costs; threshold calibrated on source true-class costs so above-threshold fraction equals source error; score is target fraction below threshold
required_inputs: source labels probabilities and target probabilities
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: source empirical prior primary; uniform prior registered sensitivity only

canonical_formula: mean_i entropy(softmax_j(cos(q_i,q_j)/0.05),j!=i), q_i=L2_normalize(target_probability_i)
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: paper softmax-output feature layer fixed; diagonal excluded exactly

canonical_formula: fit OLS Phi^-1(target_pair_agreement)=a*Phi^-1(source_pair_agreement)+b over all unordered candidate pairs; candidate score=Phi(a*Phi^-1(source_domain_balanced_BAcc)+b)
required_inputs: source and target-unlabeled predictions plus source labels and domains
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: agreement proportions use fixed Jeffreys correction (count+0.5)/(n+1); pairs are fit observations but never scientific N

canonical_formula: post-freeze association between source and held-evaluation utilities across candidates
required_inputs: frozen source score and evaluation utility
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: evaluation labels make this measurement-only and exclude it from selection taxonomy

canonical_formula: reuse C80 frozen Q0 B=1 selection distribution without recomputation
deviation_or_exclusion_reason: post-C80 outcome-informed primary labeled comparator
